Name: Faith Hope and Charity Vineyards & Winery
Description: Central Oregon winery, vineyard, wedding venue, and live music destination in Terrebonne. Offering wine tasting, wood-fired pizzas, wine club memberships, concerts, and private events with stunning Three Sisters mountain views.
Long Description:
Faith Hope and Charity Vineyards is a premier Central Oregon winery offering unforgettable vineyard weddings, live music events, and private celebrations with stunning mountain views. We're more than just a destination — we're a part of life's cherished moments.

Our lush vineyard landscape and sweeping views of the Three Sisters set the stage for unforgettable gatherings. Each bottle we craft tells the story of our dedication to quality, from vine to glass. Join us in the tasting room to savor exceptional wines and heartfelt hospitality.

**What We Offer:**
• Award-winning wines — cold-hardy estate-grown varietals plus Merlot, Syrah, and Pinot Noir sourced from Columbia Valley and Eola-Amity
• Wine tasting room open daily with French, American, and European varietals
• Wood-fired pizzas and appetizers made with locally-sourced ingredients
• Wedding venue — recognized as Source Weekly's Best of Central Oregon #1 Wedding Venue
• Live music year-round — concerts under the stars, wine release parties, winemaker dinners, and more
• Wine club memberships with exclusive varietals
• Private and corporate event hosting
• Sustainable, environmentally-friendly winemaking practices

• Same-day garage door repair for homes and businesses

Name: Three Sisters Backcountry
Description:
Three Sisters Backcountry offers unforgettable backcountry ski and mountain experiences in the heart of the Central Oregon Cascades. Known for the iconic Tam Rim Yurts and the Skyline Hut-to-Hut Ski Traverse, Three Sisters Backcountry has been connecting adventurers with Oregon's winter wilderness since 2008.

Guests can experience multi-day ski traverses, backcountry lodging, and self-propelled mountain adventures surrounded by stunning alpine scenery, old-growth forests, and the rugged beauty of the Three Sisters region. The Tam Rim Yurts provide a unique backcountry retreat, while the Skyline Traverse offers an immersive hut-to-hut experience across some of Central Oregon's most spectacular winter terrain.

Founded by local outdoor enthusiasts and now stewarded by longtime mountain professionals Syver and Lisa Pearson, Three Sisters Backcountry continues a tradition built on community, adventure, stewardship, and a deep love for the mountains.
Tags: backcountry skiing; ski touring; hut-to-hut; yurt lodging; winter wilderness; alpine adventures; guided tours; mountain experiences; Central Oregon Cascades; Three Sisters; outdoor recreation; multi-day tours; lodging; eco-tourism; Locally Owned
